moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Men's Singles Final set for Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Men's Final Anticipation
angles.copy: Who will lift the Gentlemen's Singles trophy tomorrow? All eyes on Centre Court for the Wimbledon final.

angles.name: Weekend of Tennis
angles.copy: It's finals weekend at Wimbledon! Get ready for epic volleys and championship points.

moments.title: World Cup Semi-Finals Build-Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is heading into its thrilling final stages, with semi-final matches taking place this week ahead of the final on July 19.

angles.name: Semi-Final Excitement
angles.copy: The World Cup semi-finals are here! Who are you backing to reach the final next Sunday?

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until the World Cup final! The tension is building as teams fight for a spot.

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, tees off at Royal Birkdale in England from July 16-19.

angles.name: Major Golf Week
angles.copy: Get ready for the Claret Jug! The Open Championship begins Thursday at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Host
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale hosts The Open for the 11th time this week. Who will master the links?

moments.title: New UK Official Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart has been newly updated with the biggest tracks of the week.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: What's hitting number one this week? Tune in for the latest Official UK Singles Chart action!

angles.name: New Entries
angles.copy: Any new entries making a splash on the UK Singles Chart? Find out which tracks are climbing fast.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK continues to bring daily drama, romance, and unexpected twists from the villa.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: What's the latest in the Love Island villa? Expect fireworks and shock recouplings tonight!

angles.name: Fan Reactions
angles.copy: Who's your favourite couple in Love Island right now? The drama is heating up!

moments.title: Suzanne Vega is 67 Today
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! Still loving 'Luka' all these years later.

angles.name: Tom's Diner Legend
angles.copy: From folk-pop to dance classic with 'Tom's Diner', happy birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega, turning 67 today!

moments.title: Richie Sambora is 67 Today
moments.blurb: Founding Bon Jovi guitarist and rock icon Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Bon Jovi legend Richie Sambora! What's your favourite riff he played?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Guitarist
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the one and only Richie Sambora! Rock on!

moments.title: Roger McGuinn is 84 on Monday
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder and lead singer of the influential folk-rock band The Byrds, turns 84 on Monday.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: Monday marks the 84th birthday of folk-rock pioneer Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday for Monday to the legendary Roger McGuinn. His influence on music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Deborah Cox is 52 on Monday
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B superstar Deborah Cox, known for her powerful vocals and hits like 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here', celebrates her 52nd birthday on Monday.

angles.name: R&B Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 52nd birthday to the incredible Deborah Cox on Monday! Still loving 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here'.

angles.name: Timeless Ballads
angles.copy: Celebrate Deborah Cox's 52nd birthday this Monday! Her ballads still give us all the feels.

moments.title: Joe Satriani is 70 on Wednesday
moments.blurb: Legendary instrumental rock guitarist Joe Satriani, celebrated for his virtuosic playing, turns 70 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday for Wednesday to the unparalleled guitar maestro, Joe Satriani! What's your favourite instrumental track?

angles.name: Satch Turns 70
angles.copy: Seven decades of shredding! Celebrate Joe Satriani's 70th birthday this Wednesday.

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt is 80 on Wednesday
moments.blurb: Award-winning American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, folk, and country, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Vocal Icon
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt this Wednesday! A voice that defined generations.

angles.name: 80 Years of Music
angles.copy: From rock to country, celebrate 80 years of the legendary Linda Ronstadt's music this Wednesday!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland is 74 on Thursday
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the acclaimed drummer and co-founder of The Police, turns 74 on Thursday.

angles.name: Drumming Dynamo
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday for Thursday to The Police's drumming powerhouse, Stewart Copeland! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Police Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 74th birthday to the one and only Stewart Copeland this Thursday!

moments.title: M.I.A. is 51 on Saturday
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, songwriter, and activist M.I.A., known for her unique blend of electronic, dance, and world music, celebrates her 51st birthday next Saturday.

angles.name: Boundary-Pushing Artist
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday next Saturday to the groundbreaking M.I.A.! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Dance Floor Filler
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate M.I.A.'s 51st birthday next Saturday! Her beats still get us moving.

moments.title: Daron Malakian is 51 on Saturday
moments.blurb: Daron Malakian, guitarist and songwriter for System of a Down and Scars on Broadway, turns 51 next Saturday.

angles.name: Metal Guitarist Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday next Saturday to System of a Down's Daron Malakian! What's your favourite riff?

angles.name: SOAD Legend
angles.copy: Celebrate 51 years of Daron Malakian's incredible guitar work next Saturday!
